name: Denuvoauto
description: Guided triage wizard for Denuvo offline/manual-activation support. Collects diagnostics (pub_dep.txt / pub_crash.txt), asks structured questions, and routes users to staff. Token/DRM-sensitive steps are manual staff gates — this cog does NOT automate DRM circumvention.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores transient in-memory session state (current wizard node and user-provided answers) per active session. Guild-level configuration (staff role/channel IDs) is stored via Red Config. No personal data is persisted beyond Discord IDs.
install_msg: Denuvoauto installed. Configure with `[p]denuvoautoset staffrole <role>` and `[p]denuvoautoset staffchannel <channel>`. Users start the wizard with `/denuvoauto`. Note: all token/DRM-sensitive steps are manual staff gates by design.
author: Sablinova
